Kawaiicore is an internet-driven aesthetic and subculture, often overlapping with "cutecore" or "cutecore", emphasizing an intense, maximalist, and sometimes surreal expression of Japanese "kawaii" (cute) culture. nostalgia Kawaii Aesthetic é um estilo visual focado na celebração de tudo o que é fofo, adorável e infantil. O termo vem da palavra japonesa kawaii (可愛い), que significa literalmente "fofo" ou "meigo". Yumeship é o ato de "shippar" (criar um romance entre) você mesmo — ou um personagem original seu (OC) — com um personagem fictício.

Cutecore is an internet aesthetic that emerged around 2020, popularized by the Tumblr user Vo1dchan.Cutecore draws heavily from pre-existing Kawaii fashion styles, such as Jojifuku. Common visual references include characters from Sanrio (e.g., Hello Kitty, Sugarbunnies), Mamamoko, Willa Uma, Killa Kuma, and Tamagotchi characters.
